title: Phase 5 Decision
description: Handoff file for downstream backup-creator and resource-cleaner agents. Contains only resources with user decision of 'delete'.

decision_id.description: Unique decision identifier, format: confirm-YYYYMMDD-NNN (e.g., confirm-20260609-001)

decision_timestamp.description: ISO8601 timestamp when this decision file was generated

total_resources.description: Total number of resources confirmed for deletion

resources.description: Resources confirmed for deletion with full metadata from merged view

entity_type.description: Cloud provider entity type (e.g., EC2, ECS)

resource_metadata.description: Full resource metadata from merged view (spec, actual_utilization, owner_detail, business_context, tags)
